questionHtml: A standard potometer only measures water uptake. Explain how this apparatus measures the amount of water lost by the shoot as well as uptake.
markschemeHtml:
1. water uptake by shoot causes a decrease in reading for balance 2;
  2. water lost by the shoot would be total loss from the system;

OWTTE

meta.title: A standard potometer only measures water uptake. Explain how this apparatus measures the amount of water lost by the shoot as well as uptake.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
